summary:
The patient presents with features typical for Down’s syndrome including mental retardation; however, specific details are needed regarding their facial structure as options include various craniofacial anomalies characteristic of this condition but not definitively stated here without further examination results.
The exact facial feature cannot be determined conclusively due to insufficient information provided beyond known associations between certain physical traits like moon face seen alongside intellectual disability indicative of Down Syndrome. To accurately identify among listed possibilities would require additional diagnostic imaging such as X-rays showing bone structures around mouth area clearly distinguishing one option over others
